data.name: Fantasy Pieces: Chapter III
data.detailed_description:
Fantasy Pieces is a relaxing fantasy puzzle game designed for players who enjoy calm gameplay and beautiful artwork.

Complete charming fantasy illustrations piece by piece and enjoy a smooth, satisfying puzzle experience. With simple controls and an intuitive interface, the game is perfect for casual players who want to unwind and enjoy a cozy atmosphere.

Take your time, place the pieces, and enjoy the relaxing world of Fantasy Pieces.



  • Relaxing fantasy puzzle gameplay
  • Beautiful fantasy illustrations
  • Smooth and satisfying piece placement
  • Simple and intuitive controls
  • Casual experience for all players
  • Clean and comfortable interface

data.short_description: A relaxing fantasy puzzle game with beautiful artwork and satisfying piece-by-piece gameplay.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 丹麥文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 日文, 匈牙利文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 10)
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS® 11 (64 bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5 Serise or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 12)
